articles.title_en: ChatGPT Hits 500M Weekly Active Users, Doubles YoY
articles.title_zh: ChatGPT 周活突破 5 亿，同比翻倍
articles.content_en: OpenAI disclosed ChatGPT reached 500M weekly active users globally in Q1 2026, up from 250M a year prior. Consumer + Plus subscribers crossed 50M for the first time. Geographic mix: North America 28%, Europe 24%, Asia-Pacific 31%, Latin America 11%, Other 6%. Sam Altman said the growth curve "has not bent."
articles.content_zh: OpenAI 披露 ChatGPT 2026 Q1 全球周活达 5 亿，同比从 2.5 亿翻倍。消费和 Plus 订阅首次突破 5000 万。地域分布：北美 28%，欧洲 24%，亚太 31%，拉美 11%，其他 6%。Sam Altman 表示增长曲线「仍未拐头」。
articles.so_what_en: 500M WAU means ChatGPT is now comparable in reach to TikTok and Instagram. If your AI product depends on "ChatGPT isn't enough for X" framing, measure that gap monthly — it's closing.
articles.so_what_zh: 5 亿周活意味着 ChatGPT 触达规模已接近 TikTok 和 Instagram。如果你的 AI 产品依赖「ChatGPT 不够好做 X」的定位，每月测一次差距——差距在缩小。

articles.title_en: Ethan Mollick: The New Prompting Isn't Prompting — It's Context Engineering
articles.title_zh: Ethan Mollick：新的 prompting 不是 prompt，是 context 工程
articles.content_en: "Single-prompt thinking is over. The teams shipping the best AI products are building 'context engineering' pipelines — which data to retrieve, which tools to expose, which examples to include, which constraints to hard-code. The prompt becomes a byproduct of that system, not the system itself. If your team is still editing prompts in a notebook, you're at least 12 months behind."
articles.content_zh: 「单 prompt 思维结束了。在输出最佳 AI 产品的团队都在建 context 工程管线——检索哪些数据、暴露哪些工具、包含哪些范例、硬编码哪些约束。prompt 变成这套系统的副产物，而不是系统本身。如果你团队还在 notebook 里改 prompt，至少落后 12 个月。」
articles.so_what_en: Your "prompt engineer" is now a context engineer. Rename the role on your team — titles shape where the talent pool looks.
articles.so_what_zh: 你的「prompt 工程师」现在是 context 工程师。在团队内更名——头衔决定人才池看向哪里。

articles.title_en: ChatPRD — AI Product Manager Copilot Built for Specs
articles.title_zh: ChatPRD —— 专为写 spec 打造的 AI PM 副驾
articles.content_en: AI copilot that takes a rough idea and turns it into a PM-grade PRD: user stories, acceptance criteria, edge cases, stakeholder map. Integrates with Jira, Linear, and Notion. $20/user/month.
articles.content_zh: AI 副驾，把粗略想法变成 PM 级 PRD：用户故事、验收标准、边界场景、干系人图。集成 Jira、Linear、Notion。$20/用户/月。
articles.so_what_en:
- PM tooling is a 2026 growth category; treat it like you treated design tools in 2019
- Buy ChatPRD for your PM team this week and A/B their PRD output vs status quo
- If specs improve 2x, your engineering velocity does too — that's the real ROI
articles.so_what_zh:
- PM 工具是 2026 成长品类；像 2019 年看待设计工具一样对待
- 本周给 PM 团队买 ChatPRD，A/B 它的 PRD 输出 vs 现状
- spec 提升 2x，工程速度也 2x——这才是真 ROI

metadata.positioning_en: ChatPRD named the output, not the feature. "PRD" is a specific document PMs produce; every PM instantly maps this to a job they already do, skipping the education phase competitors can't.
metadata.positioning_zh: ChatPRD 命名的是产出物，不是功能。「PRD」是 PM 会产出的具体文档；每个 PM 立刻映射到自己已经在做的工作，跳过了竞品绕不开的教育阶段。

articles.title_en: How Notion Rebuilt Its AI Onboarding to 3x Activation
articles.title_zh: Notion 如何重构 AI onboarding，激活率涨 3x
articles.content_en:
## Background & Data

Notion reported a 3.1x lift in AI-feature activation from a December 2025 onboarding redesign, disclosed at their April 19 User Conference. Activation (defined as: user creates 3+ AI-generated blocks in week 1) went from 11% to 34%. The change: instead of "Here's Notion AI, try it," the new flow imports a sample project from the user's previous tool (Evernote, Google Docs, or uploaded PDF) and pre-fills it with AI suggestions before the user writes anything.

## Analysis

- **The activation metric finally matched the product promise.** Old metric: "did the user click the AI button?" New metric: "did the user experience AI helping them on their own content?" The distinction is huge.
- **Importing pre-existing work made AI feel personal on day one.** Generic "try AI" flows optimize for discovery; Notion's flow optimizes for relevance. A pre-filled personal sample beats every blank-page tutorial.
- **The metric redefinition created executive alignment.** "Did they use AI on their own stuff" is an inarguable signal. Old definitions let product/growth argue; new one shut that down.

## What You Can Do

- Redefine your activation metric around "used on their own data" not "clicked the feature"
- Build an import flow for the single most common tool your customers migrate from
- Pre-fill AI suggestions on user's imported content — the first AI output must feel like it's about them
articles.content_zh:
## 背景与数据

Notion 在 2026 年 4 月 19 日用户大会披露：2025 年 12 月 onboarding 改版后，AI 功能激活率提升 3.1 倍。激活定义：首周创建 3+ 条 AI 生成内容——从 11% 升至 34%。改动：不再是「这是 Notion AI，试试吧」，新流程从用户的旧工具（Evernote、Google Docs、上传 PDF）导入样例项目，用 AI 建议预填内容，在用户动笔前就呈现。

## 分析

- **激活指标终于和产品承诺对齐。** 旧指标：「用户点了 AI 按钮吗？」新指标：「用户在自己的内容里感受到 AI 的帮助吗？」差异巨大。
- **导入既有工作让 AI 在第一天就个人化。** 通用的「试试 AI」流程优化发现；Notion 流程优化相关性。预填的个人样例打败所有空白页教程。
- **指标重定义撬动了高管对齐。**「有没有在自己东西里用 AI」是无可争议的信号。旧定义允许 product/growth 互扯皮，新定义直接终止争论。

## 你可以做什么

- 重新定义激活指标，围绕「用在自己数据上」而不是「点了功能」
- 为客户最常迁移自的那一个工具，做导入流程
- 在用户导入的内容上预填 AI 建议——首次 AI 输出必须让他们感觉「是在讲我」
articles.so_what_en: Notion's win: activation redefined around "user's own content" + import + pre-filled AI = 3x lift. Generic onboarding optimizes for the wrong thing.
articles.so_what_zh: Notion 的赢法：激活重定义为「用户自己的内容」+ 导入 + 预填 AI = 3 倍提升。通用 onboarding 在优化错的事。

articles.title_en: Google Lumiere 2 Goes Public, Free for Gemini Advanced Users
articles.title_zh: Google Lumiere 2 公开上线，Gemini Advanced 用户免费
articles.content_en: Google released Lumiere 2 video generation as a public feature in Gemini Advanced on April 19. Specs: 15-second clips at 4K, motion consistency across 60 frames. Pricing: included in Gemini Advanced ($20/mo) with a 200-clip monthly cap. Direct comparison to OpenAI Sora, which costs $40/mo with a 100-clip cap.
articles.content_zh: Google 于 4 月 19 日在 Gemini Advanced 中公开发布 Lumiere 2 视频生成。规格：15 秒 4K 片段，60 帧的运动一致性。定价：Gemini Advanced（$20/月）免费包含，月配额 200 片段。对比 OpenAI Sora $40/月、配额 100 片段。
articles.so_what_en: Google just cut video generation pricing in half while bundling. If your paid product depends on video features, your gross margin just got recalculated.
articles.so_what_zh: Google 把视频生成价格砍半还打包。如果你付费产品依赖视频功能，毛利刚被动态重算。

articles.title_en: Jitter — AI Motion Design Built for Marketers
articles.title_zh: Jitter —— 专为营销人做的 AI 动效工具
articles.content_en: Describe the animation in a sentence, Jitter generates production-ready motion graphics. Exports to Lottie, MP4, and GIF. Integrates with Figma. Free for non-commercial use, $29/month Pro.
articles.content_zh: 用一句话描述动画，Jitter 生成可商用的动态图形。导出 Lottie、MP4、GIF。集成 Figma。非商用免费，专业版 $29/月。
articles.so_what_en:
- Motion design is the 2026 landing page upgrade — static heroes lose A/B tests now
- Give Jitter to your content designer this week, ship 1 animated hero
- Measure 7-day conversion impact; most see 8-15% lift on the animated variant
articles.so_what_zh:
- 动效设计是 2026 landing page 升级点——静态 hero 现在输 A/B
- 本周把 Jitter 给内容设计师，发布 1 个动效 hero
- 测 7 日转化；多数 A/B 里动效版本能升 8-15%

metadata.positioning_en: Jitter positioned against Figma (adjacency) not After Effects (incumbent). This flanks the real competitor; marketers who use Figma daily onboard Jitter in minutes, while After Effects incumbents get bypassed entirely.
metadata.positioning_zh: Jitter 选择对标 Figma（相邻）而非 After Effects（老牌）。侧翼切入真正的竞品；每日用 Figma 的营销人几分钟就上手 Jitter，而 After Effects 老牌被完全绕过。

articles.title_en: Meta AI Hits iOS #1 App, Leapfrogs ChatGPT in Download Rank
articles.title_zh: Meta AI 登顶 iOS #1，下载榜超越 ChatGPT
articles.content_en: Meta AI (standalone app) reached the #1 position in the US App Store on April 19, surpassing ChatGPT for the first time. App Annie data shows 42M downloads in the prior 30 days. Driver: a Facebook/Instagram promotion placing Meta AI in the main feed, plus integration with WhatsApp contacts.
articles.content_zh: Meta AI（独立应用）于 4 月 19 日登上美国 App Store #1，首次超越 ChatGPT。App Annie 数据显示过去 30 天下载量 4200 万。驱动因素：Facebook/Instagram 在主 feed 推广，以及与 WhatsApp 通讯录集成。
articles.so_what_en: Distribution beats model quality for consumer AI. If you're a standalone AI app, your customer acquisition costs just went up — compete on vertical depth, not general chat.
articles.so_what_zh: 消费级 AI 里分发打败模型质量。如果你是独立 AI 应用，获客成本刚被推高——打垂直深度，别打通用对话。

articles.title_en: Apple Intelligence Expands to Europe After 10-Month Delay
articles.title_zh: Apple Intelligence 经 10 个月延迟后进入欧洲
articles.content_en: Apple Intelligence became available in EU iOS devices on April 19 after a 10-month delay attributed to DMA compliance. Features: all US features plus a new Schengen-region data residency guarantee. Apple invested $1.2B in local compute infrastructure in Ireland and Germany to meet the requirement.
articles.content_zh: Apple Intelligence 于 4 月 19 日经 10 个月延期后上线欧洲 iOS。归因于 DMA 合规。功能：涵盖所有美国版功能，新增申根区数据主权承诺。Apple 为合规在爱尔兰和德国投入 12 亿美元本地算力基础设施。
articles.so_what_en: The EU launch proves data residency is now table stakes. If you ship into EU, assume buyers will ask "where does the data live?" before "how good is the model?"
articles.so_what_zh: 欧洲上线证明数据主权已成入门门票。如果你卖到欧洲，假设买家先问「数据在哪里」，再问「模型多好」。

articles.title_en: Character AI Founders Return to Google Under $3B Reverse Acqui-Hire
articles.title_zh: Character AI 创始人以 30 亿美元反收购回归 Google
articles.content_en: Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas — Character AI founders — agreed to rejoin Google DeepMind under a $3B payment to Character AI's remaining entity on April 19. The deal structure: Google licenses Character's model weights and tech stack for $2.5B, plus $500M contingent on founder retention through 2028. The remaining Character AI company continues as an independent consumer brand.
articles.content_zh: Character AI 创始人 Noam Shazeer 和 Daniel De Freitas 于 4 月 19 日同意以 30 亿美元条件回归 Google DeepMind。交易结构：Google 以 25 亿美元授权 Character 的模型权重和技术栈，加 5 亿美元与创始人 2028 年前在职挂钩。Character AI 剩余公司作为独立消费品牌存续。
articles.so_what_en: The talent-acquisition premium is back. If your team has rare ML talent that's been offered elsewhere, that's a data point for your next funding valuation — not a retention risk.
articles.so_what_zh: 人才并购溢价回归。如果你团队有被外部追求的稀缺 ML 人才，那是下轮估值的 data point，不是留才风险。

articles.title_en: xAI Grok 3.1 Tops LiveBench Reasoning, Retakes Open-Source Crown
articles.title_zh: xAI Grok 3.1 登顶 LiveBench 推理，夺回开源王座
articles.content_en: xAI released Grok 3.1 on April 19 with weights under a modified Apache 2.0 license. LiveBench reasoning score: 89.4 (vs Opus 4.7 at 88.1, Llama 4 Vanguard at 85.3). Elon Musk called it "the first open-source model to beat frontier closed models on reasoning." Modified license prohibits use for "direct competition with X Corp products."
articles.content_zh: xAI 于 4 月 19 日发布 Grok 3.1，权重采用修改版 Apache 2.0 协议。LiveBench 推理得分 89.4（vs Opus 4.7 的 88.1，Llama 4 Vanguard 的 85.3）。Elon Musk 称其为「首个在推理上击败前沿闭源模型的开源模型」。修改协议禁止用于「与 X Corp 产品直接竞争」。
articles.so_what_en: "Open source with conditions" is the new default. Read the license before integrating — "Apache 2.0" alone no longer tells you anything about commercial viability.
articles.so_what_zh: 「带条件的开源」是新默认。集成前先读协议——单看「Apache 2.0」已经无法判断商用可行性。
